assets.purpose: Orient the reviewer to the shipped Agora Meeting stage and product scale.

alt.en: Agora Meeting desktop stage with participant video, controls, and live meeting state
alt.zh: Agora Meeting 桌面会议舞台，包含参会者视频、控制栏与实时会议状态

assets.purpose: Provide a static fallback for the adaptive stage transition recording.

alt.en: Representative shipped meeting-stage states showing the gallery and whiteboard workspace
alt.zh: 两种代表性已上线会议舞台状态：宫格与白板工作区

assets.purpose: Prove that live meeting events cause continuous, shipped stage transitions.
Explain how verified meeting triggers map to information priority and stage layout.

alt.en: Meeting state matrix linking sharing, whiteboard, and participant count to layout
alt.zh: 会议状态矩阵，将共享、白板和人数变化映射到布局

assets.purpose: Prove that the same meeting task adapts intentionally across four platform categories.

alt.en: The same Agora Meeting task across Desktop, Web, Tablet, and Mobile
alt.zh: 同一 Agora Meeting 任务在桌面、Web、平板和手机端的呈现

assets.purpose: Show canvas priority and participant awareness across whiteboard layouts.

alt.en: Whiteboard workspace across desktop, tablet, mobile portrait, and mobile landscape
alt.zh: 白板工作区在桌面、平板、手机竖屏和横屏中的布局

assets.purpose: Explain the verified participant-view priority used above the portrait whiteboard.

alt.en: Five-level participant-view priority for the mobile portrait whiteboard
alt.zh: 手机竖屏白板上方用户视窗的五级优先顺序

assets.purpose: Provide a static fallback for the real-time information-layer recording.

alt.en: Live captions, transcript panel, language selection, and bilingual output
alt.zh: 实时字幕、转写面板、语言选择和双语输出

assets.purpose: Prove the shipped relationship among captions, transcription, translation, and interpretation.
Explain personal caption control and host-governed transcript activation.

alt.en: Personal Live Captions compared with host-governed Transcript Panel controls
alt.zh: 个人实时字幕与主持人治理的转写面板控制对比

assets.purpose: Define the shipped boundary from live speech processing to the customer API.

alt.en: Speech flows through live processing and Meeting UI into the customer API
alt.zh: 语音经过实时处理和会议界面进入客户 API 的流程

assets.purpose: Preserve the shipped Breakout Room entry as interface evidence for the broader capability system.

alt.en: Shipped Agora Meeting Breakout Room entry inside the in-meeting application menu
alt.zh: Agora Meeting 会中应用菜单内已上线的分组讨论入口

assets.purpose: Summarize shipped platform coverage without implying unsupported product metrics.

alt.en: Shipped Agora Meeting coverage across Desktop, Web, Tablet, and Mobile
alt.zh: Agora Meeting 在桌面、Web、平板和手机四类终端的上线覆盖
